project.name: ML and Biology Starter Workspace
project.description: Synthetic starter workspace for research groups and open roles.

constraints.age_policy: Collect only public sourced or clearly estimated age; leave blank when unreliable.
additional_constraints: prioritize active groups with auditable source links

named_evidence_filters.name: Nature
named_evidence_filters.description: Exact Nature journal evidence; keep separate from broader publisher families.

named_evidence_filters.name: Science
named_evidence_filters.description: Exact Science journal evidence; keep separate from broader publisher families.

named_evidence_filters.name: NeurIPS
named_evidence_filters.description: Named machine-learning conference evidence for method-focused rows.

named_evidence_filters.name: Example Academy Fellowship
named_evidence_filters.description: Synthetic fellowship used to demonstrate medal or fellowship filters.
